name: Stir-Fried Okra with Spices
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fresh okra, trimmed and sliced into 1/2-inch thick rounds
recipeInstructions:
The following recipe is from cookbook author Julie Sahni. Serve over scrambled eggs, a rice pilaf or, American-style, in pita bread with lots of sliced tomatoes.
1. Heat oil in a large pan and fry okra and onion, stirring occasionally, for 15 minutes. If the okra looks dry, add up to 3 tablespoons water and/or cover the pan during cooking.
2. When vegetables are soft, stir in lemon juice. Lower heat and sprinkle on cumin, fennel, cayenne pepper, and salt. Stir-fry mixture for 2 minutes, or until flavors are well blended.
